Index.title: Monitor Your Website's Global Performance
Index.subtitle: Test uptime, latency, and DNS resolution from 20+ locations worldwide. Fast, free, and reliable network monitoring.

Metadata.pingTitle: Ping Online - Check Website Connectivity Worldwide
Metadata.pingDesc: Test ICMP ping to any host or IP from multiple global locations. Check latency and packet loss in real-time.
Metadata.httpTitle: HTTP Check - Monitor Website Uptime & Performance
Metadata.httpDesc: Verify HTTP status and response times from 20+ global locations. Fast, reliable uptime monitoring for any website.
Metadata.dnsTitle: DNS Lookup - Check DNS Records Worldwide
Metadata.dnsDesc: Verify global DNS propagation. Check A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, and TXT records across multiple nameservers instantly.
Metadata.ipinfoTitle: IP Info & Geolocation - Detailed Network Intelligence
Metadata.ipinfoDesc: Find detailed geolocation, ISP, and network data for any IP address or domain. Multiple provider comparison.
Metadata.checksTitle: Diagnostic Tools - Global Website Performance Monitoring
Metadata.checksDesc: Comprehensive website diagnostic tools including Ping, HTTP, DNS, SSL, and MTR checks. Multimodal analysis from 20+ locations.

Dashboard.activeMonitorsDesc: Set up automated uptime and performance tracking for your domains.
Dashboard.apiUsageDesc: Check limits and track your CheckHost API consumption.
Dashboard.adminAccessLevelDesc: You are logged in as an Administrator. You have full access to the administrative control panel.
Dashboard.userAccessLevelDesc: You are logged in as a standard user. You do not have access to the administrative control panel.

GlobalActivityFeed.title: Global Activity Feed
GlobalActivityFeed.subtitle: Recent check requests from users across the platform.
GlobalActivityFeed.noActivityFound: No activity found matching your filters.
